policy.raw_fixture_rule: Commit full source media only when redistribution is documented in the manifest and the fixture is deterministic.
policy.url_only_rule: Sources with unclear redistribution rights stay URL-only. Redistributable sources with unsupported extraction may be committed only under an explicit unsupported-adapter contract that makes no apparatus coverage claim.
policy.verification_rule: A green automated fixture means the declared fixture contract passed. Fixture-scope all-language requires structured independent DOM/archive proof or a gold graph; broader adapter support, live upstream drift, and frontend surfacing need separate contracts.

blocked_motivating_sources.apparatus_shape: Legacy flat HTML notes: inline bracketed numeric links href=#fNNn point to a trailing Notes block with a[name=fNNn] targets and no backlinks.
blocked_motivating_sources.audit_summary: Live page audit recorded 29 #fNNn/name=fNNn legacy note pairs; raw article remains uncommitted because redistribution rights are unclear, so the source is not counted as full-source corpus coverage.
blocked_motivating_sources.current_contract: blocked motivating source only; synthetic fixture keeps the legacy named-note parser shape covered without copying source text
